claudeResult.resultText:
The dashboard is live on the canvas. It's laid out as a vertical stack: a three-column KPI row (Build Pass Rate 94%, Avg Build Time 4m12s, Open Incidents 2), then a two-column grid holding the two charts side by side — a bar chart of build durations in minutes and a line chart of daily deploy counts, both keyed Mon through Sun.

One thing worth noting from the data itself: Friday is the outlier on both charts, with the longest build (20 minutes) and a mid-range deploy count, while Saturday has the fastest build (7 minutes) and the highest deploy count (7). If you want, I can add a horizontal reference line for the average build time or swap the deploy chart to an area chart to make that contrast more visible.
